name: chessboard-element
when_to_use: 需要用 Web Component 把 FEN 盘面渲成可翻转、可选拖子的标准西洋棋盘时用它,而非手写 HTML/CSS——原生手写在棋子图形、拖放动画和盘面状态同步上失败;规则、合法走子和引擎分析不在本条。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能产出 FEN 文本、Unicode 棋盘或脆弱静态网格,做不到生产级棋子 SVG、拖放与动画;该自带 shadow 的 custom element 用一个原生组件承接完整棋盘 UI。

data_in._why_no_example: FEN 是 AI 原生记法,schema 足以约束输入,不附 minimal example。

schema.fen: string —— FEN 的 piece-placement 段:8 个以 / 分隔的横行;本条经 setPosition 传入,不把回合方、王车易位等规则字段当棋盘状态
schema.draggable?: boolean —— 是否仅开启组件原生拖子 UI,默认 false;合法性校验仍由消费 AI 接规则引擎

spec.note: 棋盘 1:1;boot 显式设 480×480px和 max-width:100%,AI 可改固定 px,禁 vh/百分比高。组件内部 shadow 自带样式与棋子 SVG。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):ESM import 注册后 createElement('chess-board') + setPosition;不写声明式标签。

peer.note: 棋盘不理解规则;合法走子、将杀和 PGN 解析交给 chess.js。拖放回调由消费 AI 直接监听组件原生事件,不抽成统一契约。

carriers.widget: supported:JS createElement 绕过 sanitizer,组件自带 shadow 与内嵌棋子 SVG,无 head CSS

isolation.evidence: +esm tail `c=p([Z("chess-board")],c)` confirms side-effect import registers the <chess-board> custom element (class ChessBoardElement). lib/chessboard-element.d.ts confirms boot's props/method: `orientation: SquareColor` (l.182), `draggablePieces: boolean` (l.186), `setPosition(position, useAnimation?): void` (l.274). It is a LitElement with its own shadow DOM; grep found ZERO document.head/document.body/createElement('style') — pieces are inline SVG (renderWikipediaSVGPiece export). globalEvents=yes: 4 window.addEventListener (mousemove/mouseup/touchmove drag tracking) but 8 removeEventListener present (cleaned up), and draggable defaults false in boot. Fully self-contained in shadow.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a Web Component to render a FEN position as a standard, reversible chessboard with optional piece dragging, instead of hand-writing HTML/CSS, because native implementations fail at piece artwork, drag animations, and board-state synchronization. Rules, legal moves, and engine analysis are out of scope.
en.why_valuable: AI can only produce FEN text, a Unicode board, or a fragile static grid by default; it cannot provide production-grade piece SVGs, dragging, and animation. This shadow-based custom element provides the full board UI in one native component.

schema.fen: string -- The piece-placement section of FEN: 8 ranks separated by /; this entry passes it through setPosition and does not treat rule fields such as side to move or castling rights as board state
schema.orientation?: 'white' | 'black' -- Perspective at the bottom edge; default white
schema.draggable?: boolean -- Whether to enable only the component's native piece-dragging UI; default false. Legality validation still requires the consuming AI to connect a rules engine

spec.note: The board is 1:1. boot explicitly sets 480x480px and max-width:100%; AI may change the fixed px value, but vh/percentage height is prohibited. The component's internal shadow includes its styles and piece SVGs.
